input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule F.7.8.4 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

            TITLE: proof that the brackets are sufficiently stiff must be documented in the ses.

final_answer: Proof that the brackets are sufficiently stiff must be documented in the SES.
